---
title: "about me"
subtitle: "my data science portfolio"
# use quarto markdown to 
---

# Data Analysis

This section contains projects highlighting my skills in data and statistical analysis

## Projects

__Project 1__: Rich Distributing

For this project, I worked with a first aid company in Utah, Shield Safety, on a consulting project for their subsidiary company, Rich Distributing, to determine whether buying a new tablet machine would increase their productivity and profits.

__Project 2__: Music Education

In this analysis, I looked at data on private music lessons and performed linear regression, t-test, and ANOVA statistical tests to determine what factors go into making a lesson more effective.
